<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>IndexFlow — The Agency Operating System</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --blue: #29ABE2;
  --red: #E8272A;
  --yellow: #F5C800;
  --dark: #0D1B2A;
  --white: #FFFFFF;
  --light: #F0F6FB;
  --dim: #6B7E8F;
  --dimmer: #4A6070;
  --border: rgba(41,171,226,0.18);
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--white);color:var(--dark);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:17px;line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden;}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:50;padding:0 48px;height:68px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.96);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.logo-img img{height:38px;width:auto;display:block;}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:28px;align-items:center;list-style:none;}
.nav-links a{color:var(--dim);text-decoration:none;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;transition:color 0.2s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--dark);}
.nav-cta{background:var(--blue)!important;color:var(--white)!important;padding:10px 22px;border-radius:6px;font-weight:600!important;transition:opacity 0.2s!important;}
.nav-cta:hover{opacity:0.88;}

/* HERO */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:140px 48px 100px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#FFFFFF 0%,#EBF6FD 60%,#FFFFFF 100%);}
.hero-glow{position:absolute;width:900px;height:900px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(41,171,226,0.1) 0%,transparent 65%);top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);pointer-events:none;}
.hero-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(41,171,226,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.3);color:var(--blue);padding:6px 18px;border-radius:100px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.5px;margin-bottom:36px;}
.hero-badge span{width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--red);border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;animation:pulse 2s infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}50%{opacity:0.5;transform:scale(0.8);}}
h1{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(44px,6.5vw,82px);line-height:1.0;letter-spacing:-3px;max-width:880px;margin-bottom:28px;}
.accent-blue{color:var(--blue);}
.accent-dim{color:#B0BEC9;}
.hero-sub{font-size:20px;font-weight:300;color:var(--dimmer);max-width:580px;margin:0 auto 48px;line-height:1.7;}
.hero-sub strong{color:var(--dark);font-weight:600;}
.hero-actions{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn-primary{background:var(--blue);color:var(--white);padding:16px 36px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;font-size:16px;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 12px 36px rgba(41,171,226,0.35);}
.btn-secondary{color:var(--dark);padding:16px 36px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:500;font-size:16px;text-decoration:none;border:1.5px solid var(--border);transition:all 0.2s;}
.btn-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--blue);background:rgba(41,171,226,0.05);}
.hero-note{margin-top:20px;font-size:13px;color:var(--dim);}

/* HERO STATS */
.hero-stats{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0;margin-top:64px;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:32px 48px;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(41,171,226,0.08);max-width:720px;width:100%;}
.hero-stat{flex:1;text-align:center;padding:0 24px;}
.hero-stat-num{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:36px;letter-spacing:-2px;color:var(--dark);line-height:1;margin-bottom:6px;}
.hero-stat-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--dim);font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;line-height:1.4;}
.hero-stat-divider{width:1px;height:40px;background:var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}

/* MARQUEE */
.marquee-wrap{border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:16px 0;overflow:hidden;background:var(--light);}
.marquee-track{display:flex;gap:56px;animation:marquee 28s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap;}
.marquee-item{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dim);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;}
.marquee-item::before{content:'✦';color:var(--red);font-size:9px;}
@keyframes marquee{from{transform:translateX(0);}to{transform:translateX(-50%);}}

/* LAYOUT */
.section{padding:100px 48px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.section-full{padding:100px 0;}
.section-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 48px;}
.section-bg{background:var(--light);}
.section-dark{background:var(--dark);}
.label{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:18px;}
.label-blue{color:var(--blue);}
h2{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(34px,4vw,54px);letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1.05;margin-bottom:20px;}
h2 em{font-style:italic;color:#B0BEC9;}
.lead{color:var(--dimmer);font-size:18px;line-height:1.7;max-width:580px;margin-bottom:56px;}
hr.divider{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}

/* PAIN GRID */
.pain-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;}
.pain-card{background:var(--white);padding:40px 36px;transition:background 0.2s;}
.pain-card:hover{background:#EBF5FB;}
.pain-icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:18px;display:block;}
.pain-card h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:-0.3px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.pain-card p{color:var(--dimmer);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;}

/* SOLUTION */
.solution-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:56px;}
.solution-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:36px 30px;transition:all 0.2s;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(41,171,226,0.05);}
.solution-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(41,171,226,0.12);border-color:var(--blue);}
.solution-card h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:-0.3px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.solution-card p{color:var(--dimmer);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;}
.sol-icon{font-size:26px;margin-bottom:16px;display:block;}

/* REPLACE TABLE */
.replace-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:56px;}
.replace-card{background:var(--white);padding:24px 28px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;transition:background 0.15s;}
.replace-card:hover{background:#EBF5FB;}
.replace-before{font-size:13px;color:var(--dim);text-decoration:line-through;}
.replace-after{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dark);}
.replace-after::before{content:'→ ';color:var(--blue);}

/* SERVE */
.serve-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:56px;}
.serve-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:32px 24px;text-align:center;transition:all 0.2s;}
.serve-card:hover{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(41,171,226,0.1);}
.serve-icon{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:14px;display:block;}
.serve-card h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.serve-card p{font-size:13px;color:var(--dimmer);line-height:1.6;}

/* HOW IT WORKS */
.steps-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:56px;}
.step-card{background:var(--white);padding:40px 32px;transition:background 0.2s;}
.step-card:hover{background:#EBF5FB;}
.step-num{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:48px;letter-spacing:-3px;color:rgba(41,171,226,0.15);margin-bottom:16px;line-height:1;}
.step-card h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:17px;letter-spacing:-0.2px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.step-card p{color:var(--dimmer);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;}

/* LIFECYCLE */
.lifecycle{display:flex;align-items:stretch;gap:2px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:56px;}
.lifecycle-step{background:var(--white);padding:36px 24px;flex:1;text-align:center;transition:background 0.2s;position:relative;}
.lifecycle-step:hover{background:#EBF5FB;}
.lifecycle-step::after{content:'→';position:absolute;right:-14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--blue);font-size:18px;font-weight:700;z-index:2;}
.lifecycle-step:last-child::after{display:none;}
.lifecycle-icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:12px;display:block;}
.lifecycle-step h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.lifecycle-step p{color:var(--dimmer);font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;}

/* TOOLS */
.tools-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:56px;}
.tools-cat{background:var(--white);padding:34px 28px;transition:background 0.2s;}
.tools-cat:hover{background:#EBF5FB;}
.tools-cat-label{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:18px;padding-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.tools-list{list-style:none;}
.tools-list li{font-size:13px;color:var(--dimmer);padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.06);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;}
.tools-list li:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.tools-list li::before{content:'';width:4px;height:4px;background:var(--blue);border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:7px;}
.tools-list li strong{color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;}
.tools-cat:hover .tools-list li{color:var(--dark);}
.tools-total{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;background:rgba(41,171,226,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.2);border-radius:10px;padding:24px 32px;margin-top:8px;}
.tools-total-num{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:56px;letter-spacing:-3px;color:var(--blue);line-height:1;}
.tools-total-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--dimmer);line-height:1.5;}

/* INFRA */
.infra-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:56px;}
.infra-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:12px;padding:36px 30px;color:var(--white);}
.infra-card h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:18px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.infra-card p{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;}
.infra-icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:16px;display:block;}

/* WHY */
.why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:56px;}
.why-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:32px 24px;text-align:center;transition:all 0.2s;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(41,171,226,0.05);}
.why-card:hover{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(41,171,226,0.12);transform:translateY(-3px);}
.why-icon{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:14px;display:block;}
.why-card h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.why-card p{font-size:13px;color:var(--dimmer);line-height:1.6;}

/* COMPARE */
.compare-wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-top:56px;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;}
.compare-col{padding:48px;}
.compare-col.them{background:rgba(232,39,42,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,39,42,0.15);border-radius:14px 0 0 14px;}
.compare-col.us{background:rgba(41,171,226,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.2);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;border-left:none;}
.compare-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:24px;}
.compare-col.them .compare-label{color:var(--red);}
.compare-col.us .compare-label{color:var(--blue);}
.compare-col h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:-0.5px;margin-bottom:24px;}
.compare-list{list-style:none;}
.compare-list li{padding:13px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.08);font-size:15px;color:var(--dimmer);display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;}
.compare-list li:last-child{border-bottom:none;}

/* TESTIMONIALS */
.testi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:56px;}
.testi-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:32px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(41,171,226,0.05);transition:all 0.2s;}
.testi-card:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(41,171,226,0.1);}
.testi-stars{color:var(--yellow);font-size:16px;margin-bottom:16px;letter-spacing:2px;}
.testi-quote{font-size:15px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:20px;font-style:italic;}
.testi-author{font-size:13px;color:var(--dimmer);}
.testi-author strong{color:var(--dark);display:block;font-style:normal;font-weight:600;}

/* PRICING */
.pricing-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:56px;}
.p-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:36px 28px;position:relative;transition:all 0.2s;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(41,171,226,0.05);}
.p-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(41,171,226,0.12);}
.p-card.featured{border-color:var(--blue);background:rgba(41,171,226,0.03);}
.p-card.featured::before{content:'MOST POPULAR';position:absolute;top:-12px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--blue);color:var(--white);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;padding:4px 14px;border-radius:100px;}
.p-tier{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:14px;}
.p-card.featured .p-tier{color:var(--blue);}
.p-price{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:48px;letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1;margin-bottom:4px;}
.p-price sup{font-size:22px;vertical-align:top;margin-top:8px;display:inline-block;}
.p-period{color:var(--dim);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.p-tagline{font-size:14px;font-style:italic;color:var(--dimmer);margin-bottom:24px;padding-bottom:24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);line-height:1.5;}
.p-features{list-style:none;margin-bottom:28px;}
.p-features li{font-size:14px;color:var(--dimmer);padding:8px 0;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.06);}
.p-features li:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.p-features li::before{content:'→';color:var(--blue);flex-shrink:0;font-size:12px;margin-top:2px;}
.p-features li strong{color:var(--dark);font-weight:500;}
.p-btn{display:block;text-align:center;padding:14px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.2s;border:1.5px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.3);color:var(--blue);}
.p-btn:hover{border-color:var(--blue);background:rgba(41,171,226,0.05);}
.p-card.featured .p-btn{background:var(--blue);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--blue);}
.p-card.featured .p-btn:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(41,171,226,0.35);}

/* CTA */
.cta-section{padding:140px 48px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0D1B2A 0%,#1A3A52 100%);}
.cta-section h2{color:var(--white);max-width:700px;margin:0 auto 20px;}
.cta-section h2 em{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);}
.cta-section p{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);font-size:18px;max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 48px;}
.cta-stats{display:flex;gap:48px;justify-content:center;margin-top:56px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.cta-stat{text-align:center;}
.cta-stat-num{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:36px;letter-spacing:-1px;color:var(--blue);}
.cta-stat-label{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);margin-top:4px;}

/* PUBLISH STRIP */
.publish-strip{background:var(--light);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:28px 48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.publish-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-right:16px;}
.publish-tag{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 18px;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--dark);}

/* FOOTER */
footer{background:var(--dark);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-size:13px;}
.footer-top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:40px;padding:64px 48px 48px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.footer-brand p{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;margin-top:16px;max-width:260px;}
.footer-col h4{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;}
.footer-col a{display:block;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);text-decoration:none;padding:5px 0;font-size:13px;transition:color 0.2s;}
.footer-col a:hover{color:var(--white);}
.footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);padding:24px 48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}

/* ANIMATIONS */
.fade-in{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);transition:opacity 0.6s ease,transform 0.6s ease;}
.fade-in.animate{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);}
.fade-in.animate.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media(max-width:1100px){
  .pricing-grid,.replace-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
  .tools-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
  .steps-grid,.serve-grid,.why-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
  .footer-top{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  nav{padding:0 20px;}
  .nav-links{display:none;}
  .section,.hero,.cta-section{padding:80px 24px;}
  .section-inner{padding:0 24px;}
  h1{letter-spacing:-2px;}
  .pain-grid,.solution-grid,.infra-grid,.testi-grid,.compare-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .pricing-grid,.replace-grid,.tools-grid,.steps-grid,.serve-grid,.why-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .lifecycle{flex-direction:column;}
  .lifecycle-step::after{content:'↓';right:auto;top:auto;bottom:-14px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);}
  .cta-stats,.hero-stats{flex-direction:column;gap:24px;}
  .footer-top{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:24px;padding:40px 24px;}
  .footer-bottom{flex-direction:column;gap:12px;text-align:center;padding:20px 24px;}
  .publish-strip{padding:20px 24px;}
  .compare-col.them{border-radius:14px 14px 0 0;}
  .compare-col.us{border-radius:0 0 14px 14px;border-left:1px solid rgba(41,171,226,0.2);border-top:none;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV PLACEHOLDER - logo injected by script -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="logo-img"><img id="nav-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="IndexFlow"></a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#tools">Features</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pricing">Pricing</a></li>
    <li><a href="#compare">Why IndexFlow</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pricing" class="nav-cta">Start Free Trial →</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" style="max-width:100%;">
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-badge"><span></span>&nbsp;40+ SEO Tools · One Platform · Zero Middlemen</div>
  <h1>The revenue chain<br><span class="accent-blue">belongs to you.</span><br><span class="accent-dim">Not your tools.</span></h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">IndexFlow is the <strong>white label agency operating system</strong> built for solo founders and agency owners who are done feeding margin to platforms that take a cut of everything. One login. 40+ tools. Your brand. Your price. Your profit.</p>
  <div class="hero-actions">
    <a href="#pricing" class="btn-trial">30 Day Trial — $1 &nbsp;→&nbsp; I Want This!</a>

<!-- WHY INDEXFLOW -->
<div class="section-full" style="padding:100px 0;" id="compare">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <p class="label fade-in">Why Choose IndexFlow</p>
    <h2 class="fade-in">The agency <em>operating system.</em></h2>
    <p class="lead fade-in">Everything you need to run content, SEO, and client management from one place.</p>
    <div class="why-grid fade-in">
      <div class="why-card"><span class="why-icon">🔌</span><h3>One Platform</h3><p>Stop juggling tools. Content, SEO, CRM, invoicing, publishing — all connected. All in a single place.</p></div>
      <div class="why-card"><span class="why-icon">🏷️</span><h3>White Label Ready</h3><p>Your brand, your domain, your clients. They never see IndexFlow. 100% of the revenue chain belongs to you.</p></div>
      <div class="why-card"><span class="why-icon">🤖</span><h3>AI-Powered at Scale</h3><p>Generate 40 service pages/posts per workspace = one domain every month. Quality gates enforce standards automatically.</p></div>
      <div class="why-card"><span class="why-icon">🔄</span><h3>Full Lifecycle Coverage</h3><p>Create, optimise, publish, monitor, report. Before and after publishing.</p></div>
    </div>

    <!-- GHL COMPARE -->
    <div style="margin-top:80px;">
      <p class="label fade-in" style="margin-bottom:18px;">The Honest Comparison</p>
      <h2 class="fade-in">Not a competitor. <em>A correction.</em></h2>
      <p class="lead fade-in">The revenue chain belongs to you — not your tools, not your platform, not anyone upstream.</p>
      <div class="compare-wrap fade-in">
        <div class="compare-col them">
          <div class="compare-label">The Old Way</div>
          <h3>All-in-one platforms</h3>
          <ul class="compare-list">
            <li><span>✗</span>&nbsp;$297–$497/month, use 40% of features</li>
            <li><span>✗</span>&nbsp;SEO is an afterthought — pages don't get indexed</li>
            <li><span>✗</span>&nbsp;"White label" means their brand stays</li>
            <li><span>✗</span>&nbsp;They take a cut of your reseller revenue</li>
            <li><span>✗</span>&nbsp;Learning curve that never ends</li>
            <li><span>✗</span>&nbsp;Built on their terms, their roadmap</li>
            <li><span>✗</span>&nbsp;Price hike? Your margin shrinks.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="compare-col us">
          <div class="compare-label">IndexFlow</div>
          <h3>The agency operating system</h3>
          <ul class="compare-list">
            <li><span style="color:var(--blue)">✓</span>&nbsp;$99–$499/month. Pay for what you use.</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--blue)">✓</span>&nbsp;Google Indexing Automation built in</li>

</div>

<!-- FAQ -->
<div class="section-full section-bg" id="faq">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <p class="label fade-in">FAQ</p>
    <h2 class="fade-in">Common <em>questions.</em></h2>
    <p class="lead fade-in">Everything you need to know before you start. Still have questions? <a href="#" style="color:var(--blue);">Ask us directly →</a></p>

    <div class="faq-grid fade-in">

      <div class="faq-col">

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What's the same across all plans?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Every plan includes 40 AI posts per workspace per month, Rank Tracker (1,000 keywords), Local Search Grid (5x5), Google Search Console, full CRM, all 5 CMS integrations, Link Builder, Post Validator, On-Page Auditor, Site Profiler, Schema Markup, AI Widget, Twilio, domain mapping, invoicing, Link Health monitoring, BYOK, and multi-language support.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can I buy additional workspaces?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. On the Professional plan, you can purchase additional workspaces up to 50 total. White Label supports up to 150. Enterprise is unlimited.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">How do Rank Tracker credits work?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Every workspace gets 1 free keyword refresh per calendar week, auto-applied every Monday. Need instant refreshes? Buy credits: 5 for $10 or 25 for $35.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">How does the Local Search Grid work?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Each workspace gets 1 free weekly 5x5 grid scan, auto-applied. Buy instant scan credits: 5 for $10 or 25 for $35. The grid maps your client's Google Maps ranking across 25 geographic points — the clearest way to show local SEO progress and one of the most compelling things to include in a monthly report.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What does white label include?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Upload your logo, set your brand name, pick brand colors, configure a custom domain, and set your support email. Your clients see your brand everywhere — IndexFlow branding is completely hidden across all dashboards, reports, emails, and URLs.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What is BYOK?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Bring Your Own Key. Connect your own API keys for AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google AI, Grok, Mistral, Cohere, Perplexity), image banks (Unsplash, Pexels, Pixabay), payment processors (Stripe, PayPal), and Twilio. All keys encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Your keys, your costs, your control.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Is there annual pricing?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. Pay annually and get 2 months free (pay for 10, get 12). Solo drops to <strong>$83/mo</strong>, Professional to <strong>$249/mo</strong>, and White Label to <strong>$416/mo</strong>. The easiest way to reduce your costs without changing anything else.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can I cancel anytime?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. No contracts, no lock-in. Cancel your subscription at any time. We believe the product should earn your renewal every month — not trap it.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Do I need to move my existing website or content?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">No. IndexFlow is a delivery and optimisation layer — not a website builder. Your content stays exactly where it is. We connect to it, optimise it, and make sure Google finds it. No migration, no downtime, no rebuilding anything from scratch.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Does it work with GoHighLevel?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. IndexFlow works alongside GHL, not against it. If your clients are on GHL, IndexFlow connects to their domains and handles the SEO layer that GHL consistently fails to deliver — indexing, rank tracking, on-page audits, and reporting. You keep GHL for what it does okay. You use IndexFlow for what it does brilliantly.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What CMS platforms does it publish to?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, Ghost, and Wix. One-click publishing with automatic formatting, image alt text, and schema markup. No copy-paste, no reformatting, no broken layouts.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What happens after the $1 trial?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">After 30 days you choose the plan that fits — Solo at $99, Pro at $199, or Agency at $349. No automatic charges at a higher rate, no surprise fees. If you decide it's not for you, cancel before day 30 and you pay nothing more. We'd rather earn your business than trap it.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Is the white label actually white label?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Completely. Your logo, your domain, your colour scheme, your brand name. Clients log into what looks like your platform. IndexFlow is invisible to them — it never appears in URLs, emails, reports, or dashboards. You own the client relationship 100%.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What is a workspace?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">A workspace is an isolated client environment — their own dashboard, their own content, their own rank tracking, their own reports. Each workspace is completely separate from the others. On Pro you get 50 workspaces, meaning you can manage up to 50 clients from one login under your brand.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can I charge my clients more than I pay for IndexFlow?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">That's exactly the point. At $199/month for 50 workspaces, each workspace costs you $3.99. Most agencies charge $99–$299/month per client for SEO tooling. Two clients at $100/month and you've broken even. The remaining 48 workspaces are pure margin. IndexFlow is designed to be a profit centre, not a cost.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">How does the $1 trial work exactly?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Pay $1 today and get full access to the Pro tier for 30 days — all 40+ tools, all 50 white label workspaces, full white label branding. No feature restrictions, no watermarks, no sandbox mode. The real thing from day one so you can set up client workspaces and see the value immediately.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What does GSC Ingestion Layer mean?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">It means IndexFlow automatically pulls all your clients' Google Search Console data into one unified dashboard. Impressions, clicks, indexing status, crawl errors — all properties, all in one place. No logging into 10 different GSC accounts. No exporting CSVs. Everything consolidated and ready to report on.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Is IndexFlow SOC 2 compliant?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. IndexFlow runs on SOC 2 compliant infrastructure with data isolation per tenant, encryption at rest and in transit, and Cloudflare edge security across all deployments. Enterprise clients regularly ask about this — the answer is yes, documented, and available on request.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can I use IndexFlow as a solo freelancer?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">The Solo plan at $99/month is built exactly for you — one workspace, one domain, all 40+ tools. You get the same rank tracker, content engine, on-page auditor, and reporting suite that agencies use, at a price that makes sense for a single operator. When you land your first client, upgrade to Pro.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">How many keywords can I track?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">1,000 keywords per workspace, tracked weekly. That's significantly more generous than Ahrefs Lite (750 total) or Semrush Starter, both of which cost more than IndexFlow Solo on their own — before you count the 39 other tools you're not paying for separately.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can I run audits across all client domains at once?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. The SEO Health Dashboard gives you a cross-workspace overview so you can spot which clients have critical issues without logging into each workspace individually. From there you can drill into any domain for a full site crawl, broken link report, redirect chain analysis, and Core Web Vitals breakdown.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What's the difference between Post Validator and On-Page Auditor?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Post Validator scores individual pieces of content before or after publishing — checking keyword density, readability, meta tags, internal links, and schema on a per-post basis. On-Page Auditor runs a broader site-level crawl, identifying issues across all pages at once. Use Post Validator when creating or editing content. Use On-Page Auditor to find what needs fixing across an entire domain.</div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="faq-col">

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">How many keywords can I track?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">1,000 keywords per workspace, tracked weekly. That's significantly more generous than Ahrefs Lite (750 total) or Semrush Starter, both of which cost more than IndexFlow Solo on their own — before you count the 39 other tools you're not paying for separately.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What's the difference between Pro and Agency?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Scale and team size. Pro gives you 3 users and 50 workspaces — ideal for a solo operator or small team managing up to 50 clients. Agency gives you 6 users and 100 workspaces with advanced API access, a dedicated account manager, and priority onboarding — built for teams running serious volume.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Do my clients need their own IndexFlow account?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">No. You manage everything from your single login. Each client gets access to their own white-labelled workspace — which looks like your platform to them. They never create an IndexFlow account, never see IndexFlow branding, and never know what infrastructure is running underneath.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">How long does it take to set up a client workspace?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Most workspaces are live in under 10 minutes. Connect the domain, configure white label branding, connect Google Search Console, and you're ready to run audits, track keywords, and generate content. The setup guide walks you through every step. No guesswork.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Do I need technical skills or a developer?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">No. IndexFlow is built for agency owners and freelancers, not developers. The Cloudflare and GitHub pipeline runs automatically in the background — you never touch code. If you can use a dashboard, you can run IndexFlow. The only exception is Enterprise custom integrations, which may involve developer configuration.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Is there an onboarding guide or setup wizard?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. Every account includes a built-in Setup Guide that walks you through connecting your first domain, configuring white label branding, linking Google Search Console, setting up your rank tracker, and generating your first content batch. Pro and Agency plans also get a priority onboarding call with the team.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can I import existing content or keywords?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. You can import keyword lists directly into the Rank Tracker via CSV — up to 1,000 keywords per workspace. Existing content on connected CMS platforms is automatically detected and available for auditing, optimisation, and internal link building from day one.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What AI models power the content engine?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">IndexFlow supports multiple AI providers via BYOK — OpenAI (GPT-4o), Anthropic (Claude), Google AI, Grok, Mistral, Cohere, and Perplexity. Connect your own API key for whichever provider you prefer. No lock-in to a single model — use the one that suits your content quality and cost requirements.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can I set a brand voice or tone for each client?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. Each workspace supports its own AI training via the Knowledge Base — upload brand guidelines, tone of voice documents, example content, or industry-specific context. The AI uses this to generate content that sounds like your client, not like a generic language model.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What are quality gates and how do they work?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Quality gates are automatic checks that run on every piece of AI-generated content before it's published. They verify minimum word count, keyword inclusion, readability score, meta title and description presence, image alt text, and schema markup. Content that doesn't pass is flagged for review rather than published automatically. It's the difference between bulk content and bulk quality content.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can I use my own HTML templates for content?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. Import your own HTML design and use it as the template for programmatic content generation — your layout, your styling, your structure. IndexFlow populates it with AI-generated, SEO-optimised content at scale. Perfect for service area pages, location pages, and product descriptions.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Does it generate images automatically?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. Connect your image bank via BYOK — Unsplash, Pexels, or Pixabay — and IndexFlow automatically selects and inserts contextually relevant images into generated content. Alt text is written automatically based on image context and keyword targeting. No manual image sourcing, no missing alt tags.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What does Enterprise include?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Unlimited workspaces, unlimited domains, custom API integrations, dedicated infrastructure, Super Admin dashboard, named account manager, SLA guarantees, custom contracts, and co-marketing options. Pricing starts around $1,200/month on annual contracts. <a href="#" style="color:var(--blue);">Contact us to start the conversation →</a></div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can team members have different permission levels?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Yes. You control what each team member can see and do across workspaces. Assign roles so staff can manage their own client accounts without accessing others. The Agency plan supports 6 users, Enterprise is unlimited with full Super Admin controls.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can I manage different clients without them seeing each other's data?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Completely. Every client lives in their own isolated workspace — separate content, separate rankings, separate CRM, separate reports. There is zero crossover between workspaces. One client can never see, access, or be affected by another.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">What reporting can I send to clients automatically?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">You can schedule automated branded reports covering rank tracking, local search grid results, on-page SEO health, indexing status, content performance, and GSC data. Reports go out under your brand on your schedule — weekly, monthly, or on demand. Clients get a polished PDF that looks like you spent hours on it. You didn't.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">Can clients log into their own IndexFlow dashboard?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">No — and that's intentional. Only you control the IndexFlow workspace. If you're deploying programmatic content via IndexFlow's LLM engine, you manage what gets published. If your client's domain is on WordPress, Shopify, Wix, or another CMS, they already have back-end access to their own website as normal — IndexFlow just handles the SEO delivery layer on top of it.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="faq-item">
          <div class="faq-q">How fast does Google index content published through IndexFlow?</div>
          <div class="faq-a">Typically within hours, not weeks. IndexFlow includes Google Indexing Automation that submits new and updated pages directly to Google's indexing API on publish. Most platforms leave pages to be discovered by Googlebot on its own schedule — which can take weeks. IndexFlow skips the queue.</div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  .faq-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0 48px; margin-top: 56px; }
  .faq-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  .faq-item { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 24px 0; cursor: pointer; }
  .faq-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .faq-q { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.2px; color: var(--dark); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; line-height: 1.4; }
  .faq-q::after { content: '+'; color: var(--blue); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 300; flex-shrink: 0; transition: transform 0.2s; line-height: 1; margin-top: -2px; }
  .faq-item.open .faq-q::after { transform: rotate(45deg); }
  .faq-a { font-size: 15px; color: var(--dimmer); line-height: 1.75; max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.35s ease, padding 0.35s ease; padding-top: 0; }
  .faq-item.open .faq-a { max-height: 400px; padding-top: 14px; }
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .faq-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0; }
    .faq-col:last-child .faq-item:first-child { border-top: none; }
  }
</style>

<script>
  document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item').forEach(item => {
    item.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
      document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item.open').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('open'));
      if (!isOpen) item.classList.add('open');
    });
  });
</script>
